name: pi-tick
description: Persistent scheduled agent tasks for Pi, backed by launchd (macOS) or cron (Linux).

scripts.pretest: test -d node_modules/typebox && test -d node_modules/@earendil-works || npm install --no-audit --no-fund --silent
scripts.test: node --experimental-strip-types --test --test-reporter=spec test/schedule.test.ts test/store.test.ts test/list.test.ts test/pi-tick.test.ts test/extension.test.ts test/transcripts.test.ts test/cron-backend.test.ts test/catalog-lock.test.ts test/runner.test.ts
